prompt_text:
### Demographics: 60-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~7.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 92.5 kg; Height 166.2 cm; BMI 33.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 117/64 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.0%; 9 months ago 8.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 9.5%; current 8.7%), FPG (12 months ago 218mg/dL; 9 months ago 199mg/dL; 6 months ago 252mg/dL; 3 months ago 220mg/dL; current 231mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 90.8kg; 9 months ago 92.9kg; 6 months ago 90.9kg; 3 months ago 89.3kg; current 92.5kg), Height (12 months ago 166.2cm; 9 months ago 166.2cm; 6 months ago 166.2cm; 3 months ago 166.2cm; current 166.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 33.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 117mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 68mmHg; 9 months ago 68mmHg; 6 months ago 66mmHg; 3 months ago 65mmHg; current 64mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 52U/L; 9 months ago 59U/L; 6 months ago 60U/L; 3 months ago 53U/L; current 53U/L), AST (12 months ago 111U/L; 9 months ago 112U/L; 6 months ago 105U/L; 3 months ago 114U/L; current 104U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.4mg/dL; current 1.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; current 38mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 263mg/g; 9 months ago 194mg/g; 6 months ago 213mg/g; 3 months ago 307mg/g; current 283mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 73mg/dL; 9 months ago 73mg/dL; 6 months ago 69mg/dL; 3 months ago 70mg/dL; current 71mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 45mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 140mg/dL; 9 months ago 117mg/dL; 6 months ago 120mg/dL; 3 months ago 140mg/dL; current 128mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.9g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
